Free Birds (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $55,750,480Details
International Box Office $54,636,592
Worldwide Box Office $110,387,072
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,117,797
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,791,999
Total $18,909,796
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Two turkeys from opposite sides of the tracks must put aside their differences and team up to travel back in time to change the course of history - and get turkey off the holiday menu for good.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,805,237 (28.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$55,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,736 opening theaters/3,736 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $82,004,613

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 1st, 2013 (Wide) by Relativity
International Releases: October 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
October 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Ukraine)
October 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
October 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Singapore)
October 31st, 2013 (Wide) (Slovakia)
Video Release: February 4th, 2014 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some action/peril and rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2289, 9/11/2013)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Food, Talking Animals, Time Travel
Social setting: Thanksgiving

Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
